events.event_description: U.S. Legation established in Bolivia when the first Chargé d'Affaires, John Appleton, presented credentials.

evidence.quote: John Appleton, Chargé d'Affaires. Appointed: 1848-03-30. Credentials presented: 1849-01-03. Left Bolivia 1849-05-04.

events.event_description: U.S. Legation elevated to Embassy when Pierre de Lagarde Boal presented credentials as the first Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary to Bolivia.

evidence.quote: Pierre De Lagarde Boal, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1942-03-05. Credentials presented: 1942-05-23. Normal relations interrupted on 1943-12-20.

events.event_description: Normal diplomatic relations interrupted following an unrecognized change of government in Bolivia; Boal eventually left post on February 5, 1944.

evidence.quote: Normal relations interrupted on 1943-12-20. Note: The new Government of Bolivia was still unrecognized by the United States when Boal left post on February 5, 1944.

events.event_description: U.S. Embassy restored when Walter Clarence Thurston presented credentials as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: Walter Clarence Thurston, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1944-09-21. Credentials presented: 1944-11-16. Left post on 1946-01-03.

events.event_description: Normal diplomatic relations interrupted following an unrecognized change of government in Bolivia; Ambassador Weissman left post on July 20, 1980.

evidence.quote: Normal relations interrupted on 1980-07-17. Note: The new Government of Bolivia had not been recognized by the United States when Weissman left post on July 20, 1980.

events.event_description: Following the interruption of normal relations, Alexander Fletcher Watson served as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim, maintaining an informal U.S. presence in Bolivia.

evidence.quote: Alexander Fletcher Watson, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1980-07. Left post: 1981-09.

events.event_description: U.S. Embassy restored when Edwin Gharst Corr presented credentials as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: Edwin Gharst Corr, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1981-11-25. Credentials presented: 1981-12-10. Left post on 1985-08-09.
